case_title: MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP VS LOPEZ, DIANA E.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $720.76 FILED BY MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, DIANA E. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-15-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, DIANA E.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOPEZ, DIANA E. $720.76 PRINCIPAL, $72.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $792.76 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $19.94 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, DIANA E.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, DIANA E.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, DIANA E.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $851.27 AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, DIANA E.
